ddls:
CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color palette */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color palette */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color palette */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the palette was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the palette */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the palette was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the palette is currently active */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the palette is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., White, Black, Primary) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the color in a specific format (e.g., HEX, HSL, RGBA) */,
  "actual_value" TEXT /* Actual value of the color in a specific format */,
  "invert_value" TEXT /* Inverted value of the color */,
  "actual_invert_value" TEXT /* Actual inverted value of the color */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color format */,
  "opacity" REAL /* Opacity value for colors in RGBA format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the color was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES color_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "palette_colors" (
  "palette_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each palette-color association */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette the color belongs to */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the color in the palette (e.g., primary, secondary, background) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the color was added to the palette */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the color's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, administrator) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "palette_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the palette */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if this version is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_versions_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color format (e.g., HEX, HSL, RGBA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "from_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source color format */,
  "to_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target color format */,
  "conversion_rule" TEXT /* Conversion rule to convert from source to target format */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the conversion can be reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contrast_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette being analyzed */,
  "color1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first color */,
  "color2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second color */,
  "contrast_ratio" REAL /* Contrast ratio between the two colors */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "is_passing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contrast ratio meets accessibility standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contrast_analysis_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contrast_analysis_color2_id FOREIGN KEY ("color2_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contrast_analysis_color1_id FOREIGN KEY ("color1_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessibility_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette being checked */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color being checked */,
  "accessibility_issue" TEXT /* Description of the accessibility issue (if any) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the check was performed */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accessibility issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accessibility_checks_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accessibility_checks_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the collaboration role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
